title: Providing amounts for the expenses of the Committee on Small Business in the One Hundred Nineteenth Congress.
plain_summary: This bill gives the House Committee on Small Business money to do their work during the next two years of Congress. The committee can spend up to 8.6 million dollars total on things like paying their staff and running their office. The money is split between the two years and must be used following the rules that Congress has for spending money. This helps the committee continue doing their job of working on laws about small businesses.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on House Administration.

sections.title: Section 1  Amounts for Committee Expenses
sections.text: The House of Representatives will pay up to eight million six hundred twenty-nine thousand eight hundred forty-six dollars for the expenses of the Committee on Small Business during the One Hundred Nineteenth Congress. This money will come from the House accounts that pay for committee salaries and expenses. The money will cover all costs including staff salaries.

sections.title: Section 2  Session Limitations
sections.text: The money from Section 1 will be divided into two parts. First, no more than four million two hundred eighty-seven thousand six hundred thirty-four dollars can be spent from noon on January third two thousand twenty-five until just before noon on January third two thousand twenty-six. Second, no more than four million three hundred forty-two thousand two hundred twelve dollars can be spent from noon on January third two thousand twenty-six until just before noon on January third two thousand twenty-seven.

sections.title: Section 3  Vouchers
sections.text: Before any money can be paid out under this resolution, the Committee on Small Business must approve it. The Chairman of the Committee must sign a voucher (an official request for payment). The Committee on House Administration must then approve the payment in the way they require.

sections.title: Section 4  Regulations
sections.text: All money provided by this resolution must be spent following the rules set by the Committee on House Administration.
